name: Cael-Marshwyn
personality: A brilliantly gleaming @ crosshair-eyed duck with no hat and no small talk, standing at the intersection of every failing path through your codebase. It will find the bug before you finish describing it, and it does not need a hat to feel complete.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
